title: Losing Traders Use Discipline- The Rest Switched To Mental Alignment
preview_text:
Here's the secret to taking losses in trading:
Deep breaths. 
Mental affirmations. 
Relaxing the body.
Here's the secret to sticking to the plan:
Map your triggers. 
Visualize dealing with them. 
Keep

title: Mental Preparation Will Change Your Trading
preview_text:
Some time ago I posted this tweet about a trader’s edge:
"Setups are not your edge
Your edge is avoiding bad market conditions
Your edge is knowing your emotional triggers
Your edge is journaling

title: The Mental Switch That Makes You Dangerous
preview_text:
There is such a thing as being in the zone.

Flow exists.

Most people doubt it because they only meet it by accident, under rare conditions, on rare days, in rare moods.
That makes it feel mystical.
